# BP-81 positive variant: nested boolean expressions still read the clock twice.
lang: go
file: BP-81-variant-vulnerable.go
variant: nested-condition
---
package sample

import "time"

func active(start, end time.Time) bool {
	if (time.Now().Equal(start) || time.Now().After(start)) && end.After(start) {
		return true
	}
	return false
}
